<a id="index--commons-collections"></a>

# Commons Collections

The [Java Collections Framework](https://docs.oracle.com/javase/tutorial/collections/)
was a major addition in Java 1.2.
It added many powerful data structures that accelerate development of most significant Java applications.
Since that time it has become the recognised standard for collection handling in Java.

Commons-Collections seek to build upon the JDK classes by providing new interfaces, implementations and utilities.
There are many features, including:

- Bag interface for collections that have a number of copies of each object
- BidiMap interface for maps that can be looked up from value to key as well and key to value
- [Bloom filter](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/bloomFilters.html) classes and interfaces
- MapIterator interface to provide simple and quick iteration over maps
- Transforming decorators that alter each object as it is added to the collection
- Composite collections that make multiple collections look like one
- Ordered maps and sets that retain the order elements are added in, including an LRU based map
- Reference map that allows keys and/or values to be garbage collected under close control
- Many comparator implementations
- Many iterator implementations
- Adapter classes from array and enumerations to collections
- Utilities to test or create typical set-theory properties of collections such as union, intersection, and closure

<a id="index--documentation"></a>

# Documentation

A getting started [User's Guide](#userguide) is available
as are various [project reports](#project-reports).

The Javadoc API documents are available online:

- The [current release](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/apidocs/index.html)
- The latest 3.x release - [version 3.2.2](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/javadocs/api-3.2.2/index.html)
- The latest 2.x release - [version 2.1.1](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/javadocs/api-2.1.1/index.html)

The [source repository](#scm) can be
[browsed](https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=commons-collections.git), and we have a mirror
on [GitHub](https://github.com/apache/commons-collections).

<a id="index--releases"></a>

# Releases

The latest version is available:
[Download now!](https://commons.apache.org/collections/download_collections.cgi)

This requires Java 8 or later, see also the [release notes](https://commons.apache.org/changes.html).

For previous releases, see the [Apache Archive](https://archive.apache.org/dist/commons/collections/)

<a id="index--support"></a>

# Support

The [commons mailing lists](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/mail-lists.html) act as the main support forum.
The user list is suitable for most library usage queries.
The dev list is intended for the development discussion.
Please remember that the lists are shared between all commons components, so prefix your email by [collections].

Issues may be reported via [ASF JIRA](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/issue-tracking.html).
Please read the instructions carefully to submit a useful bug report or enhancement request.

<a id="changes--apache-commons-collections-release-notes"></a>

# Apache Commons Collections Release Notes

<a id="changes--release-history"></a>

## Release History

| Version | Date | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [4.5.0](#changes--a4.5.0) | 2025-04-19 | This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required. |
| [4.5.0-M3](#changes--a4.5.0-m3) | 2024-12-15 | This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required. |
| [4.5.0-M2](#changes--a4.5.0-m2) | 2024-06-15 | This milestone release requires Java 8 and adds the package `org.apache.commons.collections4.bloomfilter`. |
| [4.5.0-M1](#changes--a4.5.0-m1) | 2024-03-31 | This milestone release requires Java 8 and adds the package `org.apache.commons.collections4.bloomfilter` for review. |
| [4.4](#changes--a4.4) | 2019-07-05 | Maintenance release. |
| [4.3](#changes--a4.3) | 2018-12-21 | Update from Java 7 to Java 8, bug fixes, and small changes. |
| [4.2](#changes--a4.2) | 2018-07-11 | Update from Java 6 to Java 7, bug fixes, and small changes. |
| [4.1](#changes--a4.1) | 2015-11-28 | This is a security and minor release. |
| [4.0](#changes--a4.0) | 2013-11-27 | This is a major release: It combines bug fixes, new features and changes to existing features. Most notable changes are: use of generics and other language features introduced in Java 5 (varargs, Iterable), removed deprecated classes / methods and features which are now supported by the JDK, replaced Buffer interface with java.util.Queue, added concept of split maps with respective interfaces Put / Get (see also package splitmap), added new Trie interface together with an implementation of a Patricia Trie. Because of the base package name change, this release can be used together with earlier versions of Commons Collections. The minimal version of the Java platform required to compile and use Commons Collections is Java 5. Users are encouraged to upgrade to this version as, in addition to new features, this release includes numerous bug fixes. |
| [3.2.2](#changes--a3.2.2) | 2015-11-15 | This is a security and bugfix release. |

| Fix | Remove use of JUnit4 junit.framework.Test class #371. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-806](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-806). Thanks to Piyush Sagar. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Migrate Map tests to JUnit 5 assertions #391. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-839](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-839). Thanks to Sam Ng, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix links in Javadoc and documentations #325. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-835](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-835). Thanks to Marc Wrobel. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | Correct test of Collection toArray(Object[]) vs toArray() to optionally ignore array order. Ordering is not specified for some collections such as Bags. Thanks to Partha Protim Paul. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Correct test of BidiMap to optionally ignore testing the key set matches the values order. Ordering is not specified for some BidiMaps such as DualHashBidiMaps. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-836](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-836). Thanks to Anant Dahiya. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Return 0 immediately if the given iterable is null in IterableUtils#size. Update tests. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-737](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-737). Thanks to Prodigysov. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | JavaDoc for FixedSizeList should warn that modifying underlying list is still allowed and is not prevented. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-697](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-697). Thanks to Ranjan George. | [eax](#team--eax) |
| Fix | Fill in some map test cases #104. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Remove the redundant assertNull in IterableUtilsTest.find and update Javadocs. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-738](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-738). Thanks to Pengyu Nie. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | Simplify two remove-if loops #77. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-724](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-724). Thanks to Eitan Adler. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix inconsistent @throws comments in ListOrderedSet #125. Thanks to Chen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Update size to capacity for GrowthList #90. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-704](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-704). Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | TransformedSortedBagTest should work with TransformedSortedBag, not TransformedBag #98. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Remove the parentheses in the error message in CircularFifoQueue #107. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | MultiKey.getKeys class cast exception. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-747](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-747). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Walter Laan. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use newline at end of file, and convert to Unix (LF instead of CRLF) fixing checkstyle #147. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-759](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-759). Thanks to Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fixed the typo and deal the NPE with Objects.requireNonNull #118. Thanks to Chen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Javadoc BidiMap classes #146. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-757](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-757). Thanks to Chen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Assert ensureCapacity #198. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-773](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-773). Thanks to Martin Monperrus. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix flaky CollectionUtilsTest.getFromMap() #200. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-775](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-775). Thanks to Xin Tong, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Minor Improvements #203, #208. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix typo erroring -> erring #202. Thanks to EruDev. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Encountered an IllegalStateException while traversing with Flat3Map.entrySet(). #115. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-734](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-734). Thanks to Chen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Better NPE messages in CollectionUtils with Objects.requireNonNull #117. Thanks to Chen, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory, Michael Osipov. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Improve MapUtils with the null checks, add JUnit for it and add Javadoc for the parameter indent. #126. Thanks to Chen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Simplify Assertion. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-793](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-793). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | [StepSecurity] ci: Harden GitHub Actions #401. Thanks to step-security-bot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix punctuation and minor Javadoc issues #409. Thanks to Martin Wiesner, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate IterableUtils 0-argument constructor. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Tests in org.apache.commons.collections4.multimap should not depend on map iteration order, see also #429. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-850](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-850). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Anirudh Madhavan. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reimplement FixedOrderComparator#equals() and hashCode(), see also #392. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-850](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-850). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Saurabh Rahate. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Implement Layered Bloom filter #402. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-843](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-843). Thanks to Claude Warren, Alex Herbert, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Let org.apache.commons.collections4.properties.[Sorted]PropertiesFactory accept XML input. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-748](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-748). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add private constructor to ArrayUtils; better Javadocs, #195. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-772](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-772). Thanks to Arturo Bernal, Alex Herbert, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add tests for MapUtils. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-760](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-760). Thanks to Isira Seneviratne. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Add | Test subMap and tailMap #94. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add junit for add, remove, setCount and entrySet in the UnmodifiableMultiSetTest #95. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add two test cases in UnmodifiableQueueTest #96. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Update two test cases in AbstractMultiValuedMapTest testPutAll\_map1 testPutAll\_map2 #97. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add a test case for AbstractMultiValuedMapTest testToString() #100. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add a test case AbstractMultiValuedMapTest#testMultiValuedMapIterator() #108. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add junit for getWithNull and subList in LazyListTest; #103. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add test cases to ArrayListValuedHashMapTest; #106. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add test cases in UnmodifiableMultiValuedMapTest; #102. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add CollectionUtils removeRange, removeCount #91. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-674](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-674). Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add ListUtils.getFirst() and getLast(). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add singleton ObjectToStringComparator.INSTANCE. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add github/codeql-action. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add Guava testlib tests. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-811](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-811). Thanks to Ben Manes. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Add | Add BloomFilter contribution. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-728](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-728). Thanks to Claude Warren. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add lambdas function to provide default values in MapUtils #81. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-726](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-726). Thanks to liuhaozzu, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add three test cases in UnmodifiableQueueTest #105. Thanks to dota17. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add org.apache.commons.collections4.EnumerationUtils.asIterable(Enumeration). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-744](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-744). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add org.apache.commons.collections4.properties.PropertiesFactory.EMPTY\_PROPERTIES. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-746](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-746). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add PropertiesFactory. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-746](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-746). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add org.apache.commons.collections4.properties.OrderedProperties and OrderedPropertiesFactory. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Make AbstractPatriciaTrie public #407. Thanks to Vadim, Claude Warren, Gary Gregory, Alex Herbert. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-4.4-2019-07-05"></a>

## Release 4.4 – 2019-07-05

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | NullPointerExceptions in CompositeCollection, CompositeSet, and CompositeMap. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-710](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-710). Thanks to Yu Shi, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Implement Collection's removeIf(). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-715](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-715). Thanks to morningmemo, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Fix LRUMap exception message. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-718](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-718). Thanks to Eitan Adler. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Create a PropertiesFactory and SortedPropertiesFactory. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-719](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-719). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Support Transformer for LazyList #52. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-719](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-719). Thanks to Stephan Windmüller, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Make use of FunctionalInterface #48. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-723](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-723). Thanks to Eitan Adler, SOC, Bruno P. Kinoshita. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Don't include email address in Exception messages. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-716](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-716). Thanks to Sebb. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-4.3-2018-12-21"></a>

## Release 4.3 – 2018-12-21

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Use boolean operator for boolean result. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-691](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-691). Thanks to Eitan Adler. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Update platform requirement from Java 7 to 8. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-688](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-688). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Link to Javadoc API broken. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-689](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-689). Thanks to Richard Walker. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Replace use of deprecated Class#newInstance() PR #49. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-692](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-692). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Eitan Adler. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | AbstractReferenceMap made easier for subclassing; PR #51. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-696](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-696). Thanks to Maxim Solodovnik. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | StackOverflowError in SetUniqueList.add() when it receives itself. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-701](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-701). Thanks to Shin Hong, Don Jeba. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | The PassiveExpiringMap#put() method should return the previous record only if not expired. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-703](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-703). Thanks to Tomas Tulka. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Add SetUtils.unmodifiableSet(T... items) method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-706](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-706). Thanks to Richard Eckart de Castilho, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | MultiSet.Entry::getCount() isn't 0 after removing the last element. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-709](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-709). Thanks to Robert Wertman. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-4.2-2018-07-11"></a>

## Release 4.2 – 2018-07-11

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Add test for MultiSetUtils. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-681](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-681). Thanks to Stephan Fuhrmann. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | HashEntry array object naming data initialized with double the size during deserialization. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-599](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-599). Thanks to Tejas Patel, Saleem Akbar, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Unit tests MapUtilsTest and ListIteratorWrapperTest no longer fail on Java 9. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-662](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-662). Thanks to Vamsi Kavuri. | [chtompki](#team--chtompki) |
| Fix | Intermittent test failures in Windows for HashSetValuedHashMap. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-661](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-661). | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | Uncomment test in AbstractMapTest regarding LRUMap equals. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-660](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-660). | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Add | Add Automatic-Module-Name MANIFEST entry for Java 9 compatibility. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-658](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-658). | [britter](#team--britter) |
| Fix | Fix site build on Java 8. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-656](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-656). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Update Javadoc to Build on Java 1.8. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-653](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-653). | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | Build status, Coverage status and Maven central weren't in README.md. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-606](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-606). Thanks to Vamsi Kavuri. | [chtompki](#team--chtompki) |
| Update | Improve efficiency of DefaultedMap.get. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-602](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-602). Thanks to John Mark. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Small improvements for generics, conditional statements, and warnings suppressions. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-603](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-603). Thanks to Artem Konovalov. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Update | Update platform from Java 6 to Java 7. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-655](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-655). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Web site spelling error: MultiValuedMapeList. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-594](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-594). Thanks to Javen O'Neal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Correction of Javadoc for org.apache.commons.collections4.functors.CatchAndRethrowClosure. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-597](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-597). Thanks to Enrique. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add null-safe MapUtils.size(Map<?, ?>) method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-589](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-589). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | PatriciaTrie prefixMap clear throws NullPointerException. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-586](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-586). Thanks to Shailender Bathula, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add class SortedProperties to sort keys. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-654](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-654). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | org.apache.commons.collections4.ListUtils.union(List, List) should pre-allocate result list. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-666](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-666). Thanks to BELUGA BEHR. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils.addAll(Collection<C>, C[]) to addAll(Collection<C>, C...). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-669](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-669). Thanks to BELUGA BEHR, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add CollectionUtils containsAny method for primitive array: org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils.containsAny(Collection<?>, T...). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-668](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-668). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Synchronized queue wrapper in QueueUtils. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-575](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-575). Thanks to Guram Savinov, Grzegorz Rożniecki, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add org.apache.commons.collections4.IteratorUtils.first(Iterator). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-670](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-670). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add org.apache.commons.collections4.IterableUtils.first(Iterable). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-671](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-671). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | The verification of unsupported iterator methods is not complete. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-678](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-678). Thanks to Oscar Luis Vera Pérez. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ListUtils.partition potential integer overflow. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-673](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-673). Thanks to John Mark, Stephan Fuhrmann. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-4.1-2015-11-28"></a>

## Release 4.1 – 2015-11-28

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Added new interfaces "MultiValuedMap", "ListValuedMap" and "SetValuedMap" as a replacement for "MultiMap". Decorators and implementations reside in the "multimap" package and a "MultiMapUtils" class has been added. The existing interface "MultiMap" as well as the concrete implementation "MultiValueMap" has been deprecated. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-508](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-508). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Deprecated various method in "CollectionUtils" in favor of similar methods in the newly introduced "IterableUtils". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-551](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-551). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Serialization support for unsafe classes in the functor package has been removed as this can be exploited for remote code execution attacks. Classes considered to be unsafe are: CloneTransformer, ForClosure, InstantiateFactory, InstantiateTransformer, InvokerTransformer, PrototypeCloneFactory, PrototypeSerializationFactory, WhileClosure. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-580](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-580). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added validation when de-serializing a "MultiValueMap#ReflectionFactory": only Collection classes are allowed, otherwise an UnsupportedOperationException will be thrown during de-serialization. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-580](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-580). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new MultiSet interface which is intended to be a replacement for the Bag interface. The main difference is that a MultiSet is fully compatible to the Collection contract. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-567](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-567). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Subclasses of MultiKey did not re-calculate their hashcode after de-serialization. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-576](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-576). Thanks to Stephan Roch. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added set operations to "SetUtils": union, difference, intersection and disjunction. The operations return a view of the result that is backed by the input sets. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-572](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-572). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | All constructors and static factory methods will now throw a "NullPointerException" if a required input argument is null. Previously sometimes a "IllegalArgumentException" was used. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-570](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-570). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Deprecated methods "synchronizedCollection(Collection)" and "unmodifiableCollection(Collection)" in class "CollectionUtils", the corresponding methods in "java.util.Collections" should be used instead. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-571](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-571). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "IteratorUtils#collate(...)" methods did not use natural ordering when a null comparator was provided. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-566](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-566). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added support to specify the initial size of a "LRUMap". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-557](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-557). Thanks to Philippe Mouawad. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added decorators for "NavigableSet" interface. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-565](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-565). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new class "FluentIterable" to support a fluent API for manipulating Iterable instances. Additionally various supporting methods have been added to "IterableUtils" and "IteratorUtils". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-464,COLLECTIONS-442](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-464,COLLECTIONS-442). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new "ZippingIterator" and factory methods "IteratorUtils#zippingIterator(...)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-464](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-464). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new decorator "SkippingIterator" and factory methods "IteratorUtils#skippingIterator(...)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-464](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-464). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "SetUtils#newIdentityHashSet()" which returns a new identity HashSet using reference-equality instead of object-equality. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-556](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-556). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Upgraded minimum java requirement to Java 6 (up from Java 5). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-562](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-562). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "LRUMap#get(Object, boolean)" that allows to query the map without affecting the least recently used order. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-395](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-395). Thanks to David Hawthorne. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Changed return type of "ListOrderedSet#remove(int)" from Object to the generic type parameter. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-558](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-558). Thanks to Felix Rabe. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarification to Javadoc of "TreeBag#add(Object)" wrt null arguments. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-555](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-555). Thanks to M Kim. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "toString(...)" methods to newly created "IterableUtils" and existing "IteratorUtils" to get a string representation of an Iterable/Iterator instance similar to "Arrays#toString(...)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-427](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-427). Thanks to Gonçalo Marques. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Reverted performance improvement for "SetUniqueList#retainAll(Collection)" introduced in 4.0. Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity instead. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-427](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-427). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Reverted performance improvement for "ListOrderedSet#retainAll(Collection)" introduced in 4.0. Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity instead. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-426](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-426). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added a Builder for "PredicatedCollection". Elements added to the builder that fail the predicate will not throw an IllegalArgumentException. The builder supports creating predicated lists, bags, sets and queues. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-530](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-530). Thanks to Erik. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Documented runtime complexity of "CollectionUtils#removeAll(Collection, Collection). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-545](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-545). Thanks to Oswaldo Olivo. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "AbstractCollectionDecorator" doesn't forward equals and hashCode anymore. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-543](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-543). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Documented runtime complexity of "CollectionUtils#retainAll(Collection, Collection). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-544](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-544). Thanks to Oswaldo Olivo. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "AbstractHashedMap" still inherits from "AbstractMap", contrary to what the class Javadoc stated. The inheritance will now be removed in v5.0. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-542](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-542). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Changed scope of "CircularFifoQueue#isAtFullCapacity()" to public. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-539](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-539). Thanks to Guram Savinov. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | The map returned by "PatriciaTrie#prefixMap()" did not contain all keys that are prefixed by the given search key in some rare cases. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-525](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-525). Thanks to Zigler Zhang. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new methods "IterableUtils#partition(...)" to partition an input collection into separate output collections based on evaluation of one or more predicates. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-511](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-511). Thanks to Nathan Blomquist, Brent Worden. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Harmonized signature of factory methods for functor-related classes which take a collection as input with their array counterparts. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-537](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-537). Thanks to Frank Jakop. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added overloaded method "CollectionUtils#get(Enumeration, int)" and simplified code for "CollectionUtils#get(Object, int)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-540](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-540). Thanks to Daniel Stewart, Issam El Atif. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved check for null input in "MapUtils#putAll(Map, Object[])". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-536](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-536). Thanks to Tagir Valeev. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "CollectionBag#retainAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-534](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-534). Thanks to Oswaldo Olivo. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added methods "removeAll(...)" and "retainAll(...)" to "CollectionUtils" that perform equality checks using the provided "Equator" object instead of "Object#equals()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-529](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-529). Thanks to Alexander Muthmann, Dipanjan Laha. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Use correct type bounds in "CollectionUtils#isEqualCollection(Collection, Collection, Equator)" to prevent a "ClassCastException" at runtime for invalid inputs. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-531](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-531). Thanks to Dipanjan Laha. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Removed unneeded private method in "PassiveExpiringMap". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-523](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-523). Thanks to Thiago Andrade. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarification to the Javadoc of "MapUtils#toProperties(Map)" in case of null keys/values. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-516](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-516). Thanks to Cyrille Artho. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "ListOrderedSet#listOrderedSet(List)" did not remove duplicates from the input list as advertised in the Javadoc. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-524](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-524). Thanks to J Goodfellow. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "MultiKeyMap" was throwing a "NullPointerException" for various operations if two key arguments have been used and the second was "null". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-521](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-521). Thanks to Maxime Nay. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Updated code example for "PredicatedList". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-522](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-522). Thanks to Erik. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "TransformingComparator" and "FixedOrderComparator" did not comply with the contract of "Object#equals". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-512](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-512). Thanks to Cyrille Artho. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fix compilation errors when using source level 1.8 and a recent java 8 compiler. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-510](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-510). Thanks to Hollis Waite. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Clarified Javadoc of "CollectionBag" wrt changes from the original Bag interface. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-509](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-509). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Removed wrong type bounds for "ComparatorUtils#chainedComparator(...)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-507](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-507). Thanks to Gerson. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added Javadoc clarification to class "CollectionUtils" that input objects which override "Object#equals(Object)" must also maintain the general contract of "Object#hashCode()" as various utility methods take advantage of sets/maps/bags. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-506](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-506). Thanks to Anthony Communier. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new transformer "IfTransformer" and factory methods "TransformerUtils#ifTransformer(...)" which replace "TransformerUtils#switchTransformer(Predicate, Transformer, Transformer)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-503](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-503). Thanks to Josh Cain. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new decorator "BoundedIterator" and factory methods "IteratorUtils#boundedIterator(...)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-471](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-471). Thanks to Radford Tam. | [tn](#team--tn) |

<a id="changes--release-4.0-2013-11-27"></a>

## Release 4.0 – 2013-11-27

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Update | Resolved generic parameter inconsistency for various static fields, e.g. BagUtils.EMPTY\_BAG, TruePredicate.INSTANCE and many others. All accessible static fields use raw types so that they can be used directly without explicit casting. To avoid compiler warnings about unchecked conversion and/or rawtypes use the corresponding factory methods, e.g. BagUtils.emptyBag(). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-502](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-502). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Renamed methods "V MultiKeyMap#remove(Object, Object, ...)" to "V MultiKeyMap#removeMultiKey(Object, Object, ...)" to avoid future conflicts with a default method of the Map interface in Java 8. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-501](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-501). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Renamed "V MultiMap#remove(K, V)" to "boolean MultiMap#removeMapping(K, V)" to avoid future conflicts with a default method of the Map interface in Java 8. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-500](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-500). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Refactored the test framework for Bag implementations to extend from "AbstractCollectionTest" by decorating the concrete Bag instance with a CollectionBag or CollectionSortedBag. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-499](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-499). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "CollectionBag" will now also respect the contract of the decorated bag in case a null argument is provided to either removeAll or retainAll. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-498](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-498). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added bag decorator "CollectionSortedBag" which decorates a SortedBag to make it comply with the Collection contract. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-497](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-497). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | "UnmodifiableBoundedCollection" does now also implement the marker interface "Unmodifiable" similar as all other unmodifiable decorators. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-496](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-496). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "UnmodifiableTrie#unmodifiableTrie(Trie)" will not decorate again an already unmodifiable Trie. Also the return type has been changed to "Trie" to be consistent with other Unmodifiable decorators. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-495](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-495). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Moved "Equator" interface to base package for consistency. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-494](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-494). Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "CollectionsUtils#matchesAll(Iterable, Predicate)" to test if all elements of a collection match a given predicate. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-488](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-488). Thanks to Josh Cain. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Accept wildcard input where possible, e.g. in copy-constructors, Unmodifiable\* decorators and iterators. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-485](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-485). Thanks to Hollis Waite. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | No collision detection/resolution was performed when calling "CompositeSet#addComposited(...)" with more than one Set as argument. Additionally use varargs parameters instead of arrays in CompositeSet and CompositeCollection constructor and addComposited method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-481](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-481). Thanks to Hollis Waite. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Narrow return type of "BidiMap#values()" to Set as the values are required to be unique. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-480](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-480). Thanks to Hollis Waite. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed conversion of timeout parameters in "PassiveExpiringMap". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-475](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-475). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Exception in "ListOrderedMap#putAll" if map contains null values. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-474](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-474). Thanks to Ning Chen. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Update | Made field "collection" in class "AbstractCollectionDecorator" private and added setter "setCollection(Collection)" with scope protected to set the decorated collection during de-serialization. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-473](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-473). Thanks to sebb. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "AbstractMapBag#containsAll(Collection)" by returning immediately after a difference has been found. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-472](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-472). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Renamed class "TransformedMap" in package "splitmap" to "TransformedSplitMap" to avoid name clash with similar class in package "map". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-470](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-470). Thanks to sebb. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added bag decorator "CollectionBag" which decorates a bag to make it comply with the Collection contract. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-468](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-468). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Replaced "Collection" with "Iterable" for method arguments where applicable. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-466](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-466). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "PushbackIterator" decorator to support pushback of elements during iteration. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-463](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-463). Thanks to Andy Seaborne, Claude Warren. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "PeekingIterator" decorator to support one-element lookahead during iteration. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-462](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-462). Thanks to Andy Seaborne, Claude Warren. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added additional clarification to Javadoc of interface "Put" wrt return type of "put(Object, Object)" method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-461](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-461). Thanks to Matt Benson, sebb. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Changed "IteratorChain" to use internally a "Queue" instead of a "List". Iterators are removed from the queue once used and can be garbage collected after being exhausted. Additionally removed the methods "setIterator(Iterator)" and "getIterators()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-460](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-460). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Removed method "setArray(Object)" in class ArrayIterator and method "setArray(Object[])" in class ObjectArrayIterator and made fields array, startIndex and endIndex final. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-459](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-459). Thanks to sebb. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Remove | Removed unused class "AbstractUntypedCollectionDecorator<E, D>". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-458](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-458). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | Added methods "ListUtils#longestCommonSubsequence(...)" to get the longest common subsequence of arbitrary lists or CharSequences. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-456](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-456). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Changed scope of fields to private where appropriate. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-455](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-455). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Update | An iterator over a "Flat3Map#entrySet()" will now return independent Map.Entry objects that will not change anymore when the iterator progresses. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-454](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-454). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Several closure and transformer implementations in the functors package will now copy an array as input to their constructor (e.g. ChainedClosure). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-453](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-453). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Change base package to org.apache.commons.collections4. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-452](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-452). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | The constructors for all Utils classes are now private to prevent instantiation. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-451](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-451). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added methods "forAllButLastDo(Collection, Closure)" and "forAllButLastDo(Iterator, Closure)" to class "CollectionUtils". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-450](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-450). Thanks to J. Moldawski. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Tree traversal with a TreeListIterator will not be affected anymore by the removal of an element directly after a call to previous(). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-447](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-447). Thanks to Jeffrey Barnes. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "CollectionUtils#isEqualCollection(Collection, Collection, Equator)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-446](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-446). Thanks to Matt Lachman. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Adapt and/or ignore several unit tests when run on an IBM J9 VM (specification version 1.6.0) due to a faulty "java.util.TreeMap" implementation. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-445](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-445). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | SetUniqueList.set(int, E) now works correctly if the object to be inserted is already placed at the given position. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-444](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-444). Thanks to Thomas Vahrst, John Vasileff. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | MultiKeyMap.clone() now correctly calls super.clone(). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-441](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-441). Thanks to Thomas Vahrst. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "emptyIfNull" methods to classes "CollectionUtils", "ListUtils", "SetUtils" and "MapUtils". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-436](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-436). Thanks to Arman Sharif. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improve performance of "TreeList#addAll" and "TreeList(Collection)" by converting the input collection into an AVL tree and efficiently merge it into the existing tree. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-433](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-433). Thanks to Jeffrey Barnes. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Replaced "Buffer" interface with "java.util.Queue". Kept "CircularFifoQueue" as well as "Predicated", "Transformed" and "Unmodifiable" decorators. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-432](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-432). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "CollectionUtils#containsAll(Collection, Collection)" with guaranteed runtime complexity of O(n + m) and space complexity of O(n). This method may yield much better performance than "Collection#containsAll(Collection)" depending on the use-case and type of collection used. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-429,COLLECTIONS-434](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-429,COLLECTIONS-434). Thanks to Adrian Nistor, Mert Guldur. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed performance issue in "SetUniqueList#retainAll" method for large collections. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-427](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-427). Thanks to Mert Guldur. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Fix | Fixed performance issue in "ListOrderedSet#retainAll" method for large collections. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-426](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-426). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "ListOrderedMap#remove(Object)" method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-425](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-425). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | "CompositeSet" does not inherit from "CompositeCollection" anymore. The inner class "SetMutator" has been updated accordingly. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-424](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-424). Thanks to Michael Pradel. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "CollectionUtils#permutations(Collection)" and class "PermutationIterator" to generate unordered permutations of a collection. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-422](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-422). Thanks to Benoit Corne. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Update Javadoc for "ListUtils#lazyList()" and "ListUtils#fixedSizeList()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-421](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-421). Thanks to Benedikt Ritter. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "AbstractDualBidiMap#retainAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-419](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-419). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "AbstractLinkedList#retainAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-417](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-417). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "AbstractLinkedList#removeAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-415](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-415). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed several compilation issues with older Java 1.6 compilers. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-414](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-414). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "removeAll()" method for sets returned by "DualHashBidiMap#entrySet()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-413](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-413). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "CollectionUtils#subtract" methods. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-412](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-412). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed possible "IndexOutOfBoundsException" in "ListOrderedMap#putAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-411](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-411). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "SetUniqueList#addAll" method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-410](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-410). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "ListOrderedSet#addAll" method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-409](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-409). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "SetUniqueList#removeAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-408](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-408). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "ListOrderedSet#remove(Object)" in case the object is not contained in the Set. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-407](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-407). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "ListUtils#subtract" method. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-406](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-406). Thanks to Adrian Nistor. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "ListUtils#select" and "ListUtils#selectRejected" methods. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-405](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-405). Thanks to Adam Dyga. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Add | Added an implementation of Eugene Myers difference algorithm in package o.a.c.c.sequence. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-404](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-404). Thanks to Jordane Sarda. | [luc](#team--luc) |
| Fix | Added missing null check in "CollectionUtils#addIgnoreNull(Collection, Object)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-400](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-400). Thanks to Shin Hwei Tan. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added new method "get(int)" to "CircularFifoQueue". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-399](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-399). Thanks to Sebb. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "LazyIteratorChain" iterator. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-396](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-396). Thanks to Jeff Rodriguez. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added "ListUtils#partition" method to split a List into consecutive sublists. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-393](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-393). Thanks to Chris Shayan. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed Javadoc for "MapUtils#toProperties(Map)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-391](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-391). Thanks to Shin Hwei Tan. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Clarified Javadoc for "TransformerUtils#mapTransformer" for null input. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-389](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-389). Thanks to Shin Hwei Tan. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Clarified Javadoc for "FactoryUtils#prototypeFactory" for null input. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-388](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-388). Thanks to Shin Hwei Tan. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed inconsistent Javadoc for "MapUtils#synchronizedMap(Map)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-384](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-384). Thanks to Shin Hwei Tan. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Added "CollectionUtils#forAllDo" implementation which takes an "Iterator" as input. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-383](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-383). Thanks to Adrian Cumiskey. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Change maven coordinates to "org.apache.commons.commons-collections4". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-382](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-382). Thanks to Olivier Lamy. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | Move the project structure to a standard maven layout. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-381](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-381). Thanks to Olivier Lamy. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Fixed infinite loop when calling "UnmodifiableBoundedCollection#unmodifiableBoundedCollection()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-380](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-380). Thanks to Dave Brosius. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed Javadoc for several methods wrt expected NullPointerExceptions. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-379](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-379). Thanks to Shin Hwei Tan. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "ListUtils#defaultIfNull(List, List)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-375](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-375). Thanks to Ivan Hristov. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | TransformingComparator now supports different types for its input/output values. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-372](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-372). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "DualTreeBidiMap" now uses the correct comparator for the reverse map during de-serialization. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-364](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-364). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | "TransformedMap" in the package "splitmap" can now be serialized. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-363](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-363). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Update | "CollectionUtils#filter(Iterable, Predicate)" will now return whether the collection has been modified. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-362](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-362). Thanks to Jean-Noel Rouvignac. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Add | Add method "CollectionUtils#filterInverse(Iterable, Predicate)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-361](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-361). Thanks to Jean-Noel Rouvignac. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "FilterListIterator#hasNext" does not throw a NullPointerException anymore to comply to the Java iterator specification. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-360](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-360). Thanks to Sai Zhang. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | "ListUtils#intersection(List, List)" will now also work correctly if there are duplicate elements in the provided lists. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-359](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-359). Thanks to Mark Shead. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "AbstractCollectionDecorator" will now use internally "decorated()" to access the decorated collection. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-352](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-352). Thanks to Adam Gent. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Remove | Removed features which are now supported by the JDK. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-351](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-351). Thanks to Henri Yandell. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Removed debug output in "MapUtils#getNumber(Map)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-350](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-350). Thanks to Michael Akerman. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fixed Javadoc for all "transformedXXX(XXX)" methods in the respective Utils classes to clarify that existing objects in the list are not transformed. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-348](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-348). Thanks to Paul Benedict. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Fix | Singleton classes in package "functors" are now correctly de-serialized. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-343](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-343). Thanks to Goran Hacek. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Update | "NOPClosure" is now a final class. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-341](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-341). Thanks to Goran Hacek. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Fix | Removed broken methods "equals(Object)" and "hashCode()" in class "NOPClosure". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-340](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-340). Thanks to Goran Hacek. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Fix | Simplified exceptions as the cause is available from the parent. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-336](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-336). Thanks to sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fixed cache assignment for "TreeBidiMap#entrySet". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-335](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-335). Thanks to sebb. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | Synchronized access to lock in "StaticBucketMap#size()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-334](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-334). Thanks to sebb. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | Added clarification to Javadoc of "ListOrderedMap" that "IdentityMap" and "CaseInsensitiveMap" are not supported. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-332](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-332). Thanks to Tom Parker. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | Improve Javadoc of "CollatingIterator" wrt the used "Comparator" and throw a NullPointerException in "CollatingIterator#least" if no comparator is set. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-331](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-331). Thanks to Michael Krkoska. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | "LRUMap#keySet()#remove(Object)" will not throw a "ConcurrentModificationException" anymore. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-330](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-330). Thanks to Joerg Schaible. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "ListUtils#intersection(List, List)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-328](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-328). Thanks to Thomas Rogan, Jilles van Gurp. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added serialVersionUID fields for "CompositeCollection", "CompositeSet", "EmptyMapMutator", "EmptySetMutator". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-327](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-327). Thanks to sebb. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Update | Fields transformer and decorated in class "TransformingComparator" are now final. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-324](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-324). Thanks to sebb. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Changed behavior of "CaseInsensitiveMap" constructor to be compliant with "HashMap" in case the initial capacity is set to zero. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-323](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-323). Thanks to Maarten Brak. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Add | Added NodeListIterator and convenience methods in IteratorUtils to iterate over an org.w3c.dom.NodeList. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-322](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-322). Thanks to Thomas Vahrst. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Improved performance of "StaticBucketMap#putAll(Map)" by iterating over the entry set. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-320](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-320). Thanks to sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Avoid redundant null check in "IteratorUtils#getIterator(Object)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-319](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-319). Thanks to sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Use a private method to populate the object in "AbstractHashedMap(Map)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-317](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-317). Thanks to sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fixed Javadoc of "LRUMap" wrt to the maxSize parameter of the constructor. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-316](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-316). Thanks to ori. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added new abstract class "CatchAndRethrowClosure" that re-throws any checked exception as unchecked "FunctorException". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-313](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-313). Thanks to David J. M. Karlsen. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Fix | Use of final keyword where applicable, minor performance improvements by properly initializing the capacity of newly created collections when known in advance. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-312](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-312). Thanks to Peter Lawrey, Gary Gregory. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | "SetUniqueList#subList()" will now return an unmodifiable list as changes to it may invalidate the parent list. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-307](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-307). Thanks to Christian Semrau, Thomas Vahrst. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "SetUniqueList#subList()#contains(Object)" will now correctly check the subList rather than the parent list. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-307](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-307). Thanks to Christian Semrau. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added method "CollectionUtils#subtract(Iterable, Iterable, Predicate)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-306](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-306). Thanks to Chris Shayan. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Fix | "SetUniqueList#set(int, Object)" will now correctly enforce the uniqueness constraint. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-304](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-304). Thanks to Rafał Figas, Bjorn Townsend. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Improved Javadoc for "Unmodifiable\*" classes wrt behavior when the user tries to modify the collection. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-303](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-303). Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Update | Calling "CollectionUtils#sizeIsEmpty(null)" will now return true. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-298](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-298). Thanks to Benjamin Bentmann. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added methods "CollectionUtils#collate(...)" to merge two sorted Collections into a sorted List using the standard O(n) merge algorithm. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-296](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-296). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "CaseInsensitiveMap" will now convert input strings to lower-case in a locale-independent manner. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-294](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-294). Thanks to Benjamin Bentmann. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added support for using custom "Equator" objects in "EqualPredicate". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-293](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-293). Thanks to Stephen Kestle. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "CollatingIterator#getIteratorIndex()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-289](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-289). Thanks to Fredrik Kjellberg. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fixed Javadoc for "ListUtils#transformedList(List)" to clarify that existing objects in the list are not transformed. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-256,COLLECTIONS-288](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-256,COLLECTIONS-288). Thanks to Paul Benedict. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added method "CollectionUtils#extractSingleton(Collection)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-286](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-286). Thanks to Geoffrey De Smet. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Add | Added serialization support for "TreeBidiMap". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-285](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-285). Thanks to Christian Gruenberg. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | The predicate that rejected an object to be added to a "PredicatedCollection" is now contained in the respective exception message. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-280](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-280). Thanks to Chris Lewis. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added "IndexedCollection" collection decorator which provides a map-like view on an existing collection. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-275](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-275). Thanks to Stephen Kestle. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added serialization support for "FixedOrderComparator" and "TransformingComparator". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-272](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-272). Thanks to Chaitanya Mutyala. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "MultiKey" will now be correctly serialized/de-serialized. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-266](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-266). Thanks to Joerg Schaible. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Update | "TreeBag" will now only accept "Comparable" objects as input when used with natural ordering. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-265](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-265). Thanks to David Saff. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added methods "MapUtils#populateMap(MultiMap, ...)" to support also "MultiMap" instances as input. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-263](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-263). Thanks to John Hunsley. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Fixed Javadoc for methods "firstKey()" and "lastKey()" in class "AbstractLinkedMap". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-262](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-262). Thanks to Lisen Mu. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "Flat3Map#remove(Object)" will now return the correct value mapped to the removed key if the size of the map is less or equal 3. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-261](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-261). Thanks to ori. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added constructor "TransformingComparator(Transformer)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-260](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-260). Thanks to Stephen Kestle. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Add | Added "DualLinkedHashBidiMap" bidi map implementation. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-258](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-258). Thanks to Nathan Blomquist. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Removed unused variables in "TreeBidiMap". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-255](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-255). Thanks to Henri Yandell. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Update | The static factory methods have been renamed from "getInstance()" to a camel-case version of the class name, e.g. "truePredicate()" for class "TruePredicate". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-251,COLLECTIONS-321](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-251,COLLECTIONS-321). Thanks to Stephen Kestle. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Fix | "SetUniqueList.addAll(int, Collection)" now correctly add the collection at the provided index. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-249](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-249). Thanks to Joe Kelly. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added "Equator" interface. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-242](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-242). | [skestle](#team--skestle) |
| Add | Added "PassiveExpiringMap" map decorator. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-241](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-241). Thanks to Elifarley Callado Coelho. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Update | "MultiValueMap" is now serializable. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-240](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-240). Thanks to Wouter de Vaal. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added method "MultiValueMap#iterator()" to return a flattened version of "entrySet().iterator()". Clarified Javadoc for "entrySet()" that the returned Entry objects are unflattened, i.e. the Entry object for a given key contains all values mapped to this key. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-237](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-237). Thanks to Nils Kaiser, Alan Mehlo. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Added method "ListUtils#indexOf(List, Predicate)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-235](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-235). Thanks to Nathan Egge. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fixed several unit tests which were using parameters to "assertEquals(...)" in wrong order. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-232](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-232). Thanks to Mark Hindess. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Update | Return concrete class in static factory methods instead of base class interface (except for Unmodifiable decorators). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-231](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-231). Thanks to Torsten Curdt. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | "CollectionUtils#size(Collection)" now returns 0 when called with null as input. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-230,COLLECTIONS-297,COLLECTIONS-318](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-230,COLLECTIONS-297,COLLECTIONS-318). Thanks to Stepan Koltsov, sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Remove | Removed deprecated classes and methods. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-229](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-229). | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Fix | "MultiValueMap#put(Object, Object)" and "MultiValueMap#putAll(Object, Collection)" now correctly return if the map has changed by this operation. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-228](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-228). | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Add | Added method "ListOrderedMap#putAll(int, Map)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-226](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-226). Thanks to Vasily Ivanov. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Added new "Trie" interface with a first concrete implementation "PatriciaTrie" together with decorators "Unmodifiable" and "Synchronized". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-225](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-225). Thanks to Sam Berlin, Roger Kapsi. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | "CollectionUtils#addAll(...)" methods now return if the collection has been changed by this operation. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-223](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-223). Thanks to Vasily Ivanov. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Update | "CompositeCollection", "CompositeMap" and "CompositeSet" are now serializable. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-221](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-221). Thanks to Pal Denes. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "CollectionUtils#removeAll" wrongly called "ListUtils#retainAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-219](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-219). Thanks to Tom Leccese. | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Update | The "CollectionUtils#select(Collection, Predicate, Collection)" method will now return the output collection. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-218](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-218). | [skestle](#team--skestle) |
| Fix | Calling "setValue(Object)" on any Entry returned by a "Flat3Map" will now correctly set the value for the current entry. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-217](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-217). Thanks to Matt Bishop. | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Fix | "MultiKey#toString()" will now use "Arrays#toString(List)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-216](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-216). Thanks to Hendrik Maryns. | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Add | Added support for resettable iterators in "IteratorIterable". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-213](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-213). Thanks to Dusan Chromy. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |
| Add | Added methods "MapUtils#populateMap(Map, Iterable, Transformer, ...)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-194](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-194). Thanks to Dave Meikle. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Update | "CollectionUtils#forAllDo(Collection, Closure)" now returns the provided closure. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-182](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-182). Thanks to Jim Cakalic. | [mbenson](#team--mbenson) |
| Update | Make generic versions of all classes in collections. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-110,COLLECTIONS-243,COLLECTIONS-245,COLLECTIONS-247, COLLECTIONS-253,COLLECTIONS-273,COLLECTIONS-282](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-110,COLLECTIONS-243,COLLECTIONS-245,COLLECTIONS-247,                    COLLECTIONS-253,COLLECTIONS-273,COLLECTIONS-282). | [multiple](#team--multiple) |
| Add | Added class "ComparatorPredicate". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-8](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-8). Thanks to Rune Peter Bjørnstad. | [brentworden](#team--brentworden) |

<a id="changes--release-3.2.2-2015-11-15"></a>

## Release 3.2.2 – 2015-11-15

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Update | Serialization support for unsafe classes in the functor package is disabled by default as this can be exploited for remote code execution attacks. To re-enable the feature the system property "org.apache.commons.collections.enableUnsafeSerialization" needs to be set to "true". Classes considered to be unsafe are: CloneTransformer, ForClosure, InstantiateFactory, InstantiateTransformer, InvokerTransformer, PrototypeCloneFactory, PrototypeSerializationFactory, WhileClosure. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-580](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-580). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | "ExtendedProperties" will now use a privileged action to access the "file.separator" system property. In case the class does not have permission to read system properties, the "File#separator" field will be used instead. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-538](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-538). Thanks to Trejkaz. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Tree traversal with a TreeListIterator will not be affected anymore by the removal of an element directly after a call to previous(). Fixes [COLLECTIONS-447](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-447). Thanks to Jeffrey Barnes. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | SetUniqueList.set(int, Object) now works correctly if the object to be inserted is already placed at the given position. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-444](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-444). Thanks to Thomas Vahrst, John Vasileff. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Removed debug output in "MapUtils#getNumber(Map)". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-350](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-350). Thanks to Michael Akerman. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fixed cache assignment for "TreeBidiMap#entrySet". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-335](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-335). Thanks to sebb. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | Synchronized access to lock in "StaticBucketMap#size()". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-334](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-334). Thanks to sebb. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | "SetUniqueList#subList()#contains(Object)" will now correctly check the subList rather than the parent list. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-307](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-307). Thanks to Christian Semrau. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "SetUniqueList#set(int, Object)" will now correctly enforce the uniqueness constraint. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-304](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-304). Thanks to Rafał Figas, Bjorn Townsend. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "CaseInsensitiveMap" will now convert input strings to lower-case in a locale-independent manner. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-294](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-294). Thanks to Benjamin Bentmann. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "MultiKey" will now be correctly serialized/de-serialized. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-266](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-266). Thanks to Joerg Schaible. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "Flat3Map#remove(Object)" will now return the correct value mapped to the removed key if the size of the map is less or equal 3. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-261](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-261). Thanks to ori. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "SetUniqueList.addAll(int, Collection)" now correctly add the collection at the provided index. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-249](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-249). Thanks to Joe Kelly. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | "MultiValueMap#put(Object, Object)" and "MultiValueMap#putAll(Object, Collection)" now correctly return if the map has changed by this operation. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-228](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-228). | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Fix | "CollectionUtils#removeAll" wrongly called "ListUtils#retainAll". Fixes [COLLECTIONS-219](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-219). Thanks to Tom Leccese. | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |
| Fix | Calling "setValue(Object)" on any Entry returned by a "Flat3Map" will now correctly set the value for the current entry. Fixes [COLLECTIONS-217](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-217). Thanks to Matt Bishop. | [scolebourne](#team--scolebourne) |

<a id="scm--overview"></a>

# Overview

This project uses [Git](https://git-scm.com/) to manage its source code. Instructions on Git use can be found at <https://git-scm.com/doc>.

<a id="scm--web-browser-access"></a>

# Web Browser Access

The following is a link to a browsable version of the source repository:

```
https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=commons-collections.git
```

<a id="scm--anonymous-access"></a>

# Anonymous Access

The source can be checked out anonymously from Git with this command (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>):

```
$ git clone http://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/commons-collections.git
```

<a id="scm--developer-access"></a>

# Developer Access

Only project developers can access the Git tree via this method (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>).

```
$ git clone https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/commons-collections.git
```

<a id="scm--access-from-behind-a-firewall"></a>

# Access from Behind a Firewall

Refer to the documentation of the SCM used for more information about access behind a firewall.
